diseasePrediction.title: Crop Disease Predictor
diseasePrediction.subtitle: Upload a clear image of your crop leaf to detect possible diseases.
diseasePrediction.uploadPlaceholder: Click to upload or drag & drop
diseasePrediction.cameraErrorGeneric: Unable to access camera. Please check permissions or try using file upload instead.
diseasePrediction.cameraPermissionDenied: Camera access was denied. Please allow camera permissions to use this feature.
diseasePrediction.cameraNotFound: No camera device found on your device.
diseasePrediction.cameraNotSupported: Camera access is not supported in your browser.
diseasePrediction.cameraInUse: Camera is currently being used by another application.
diseasePrediction.cameraConstraintError: Camera configuration not supported by your device.
diseasePrediction.cameraErrorSolution: Would you like help with camera setup?
diseasePrediction.enableCameraInstructions:
To enable camera:

1. Look for camera icon in your browser's address bar
2. Click 'Allow' when prompted for camera access
3. On mobile: Go to browser settings > Site permissions > Camera > Allow
4. Refresh the page and try again
diseasePrediction.httpsRequired: Camera access requires a secure connection (HTTPS). Please access this site using HTTPS.
diseasePrediction.videoLoadTimeout: Camera is taking too long to initialize. Please try again.
diseasePrediction.chromeSpecificInstructions: Chrome users: Make sure you're using HTTPS and camera permissions are enabled in site settings.
diseasePrediction.httpsInstructions:
For Chrome camera access:

1. Use HTTPS instead of HTTP
2. Click the lock/shield icon in address bar
3. Set Camera to 'Allow'
4. Refresh the page

For local development, use: https://localhost:5173
diseasePrediction.analyzingDesc: Our model is examining the crop image to detect diseases...
diseasePrediction.invalidMessage: Please Upload a Proper Plant Image
diseasePrediction.invalidDescription: The uploaded image doesn't appear to contain a clear view of a plant or crop leaf. For accurate disease detection, please ensure your image includes:

uploading.title: Uploading Image
uploading.description: Securely transferring your image to our AI system

processing.title: Processing Image
processing.description: Enhancing image quality and extracting features

analyzing.title: AI Analysis
analyzing.description: Deep learning model examining plant characteristics

facts.fact1: Plant diseases cost farmers billions annually worldwide, making early detection crucial for food security.
facts.fact2: AI can detect plant diseases up to 98% accurately, often better than human experts in controlled conditions.
facts.fact3: Over 80% of plant diseases are caused by fungi, making moisture and humidity key factors.
facts.fact4: Early disease detection can reduce crop losses by up to 40% and minimize pesticide usage.
facts.fact5: Some plant diseases can spread through wind, water, insects, or contaminated tools within hours.
facts.fact6: Healthy soil with good microorganisms can naturally suppress many plant diseases.

requirements.clearView: Clear view of plant leaves or crops
requirements.focusPlant: Focus on diseased or healthy plant parts

supportedCrops.title: Supported Crops
supportedCrops.subtitle: Our AI model is trained to detect diseases in the following crops:
supportedCrops.note: Note: For accurate disease detection, please upload images only from these supported crop types.

step1.title: Upload Image
step1.description: Take a clear photo of the affected leaf from supported crops and upload it

step2.title: AI Analysis
step2.description: Our advanced AI model analyzes the image to detect disease patterns

step3.title: Get Results
step3.description: Receive detailed diagnosis with treatment recommendations

dataNotice.title: Improving Our Model
dataNotice.description: We store uploaded images to continuously improve our AI model. Your data helps us provide better disease detection for farmers worldwide.

diseasePrediction.errorMessage: We're having trouble connecting to our disease detection service
diseasePrediction.errorSolution:
• Check your internet connection
• Wait a moment and try again
• Contact support if the problem persists

network.title: Network Connection Issue
network.description: Unable to reach our servers. Please check your internet connection and try again.
suggestions: Try switching to a different network
Disable VPN if you're using one
Try again in a few moments

server.title: Server Temporarily Down
server.description: Our disease detection service is temporarily unavailable. We're working to fix this quickly.
suggestions: Please try again in a few minutes
Save your image and retry later
Check our status page for updates

timeout.title: Request Timed Out
timeout.description: The analysis is taking longer than expected. This might be due to high server load.
suggestions: Wait a moment and try again

fileSize.title: File Too Large
fileSize.description: The image you uploaded is too large for processing.
suggestions: Use JPEG format for smaller files
Use an image editing app to resize

invalidFile.title: Invalid File Format
invalidFile.description: The file you uploaded is not a supported image format.
suggestions: Use JPG, JPEG, or PNG format
Make sure the file isn't corrupted
Convert your file to a supported format

cors.title: Access Blocked
cors.description: Browser security settings are preventing the connection.

unknown.title: Unexpected Error
unknown.description: Something unexpected happened during the analysis.
suggestions: Refresh the page and try again
